content.en:
Ye Tian immediately began to try to break his fourth shackle chain.

Originally, it was very difficult to break the fourth shackle chain, and it required a large number of cursed black stones, but now under the effect of these wisps of black aura, the fourth shackle chain was very loose.

Of course.

The Life White Stone still has to be consumed, otherwise it will not be able to break the shackles, and the black aura can only replace the cursed Black Stone.

With the passage of time, finally in the near future, this fourth shackle chain was broken by Ye Tian.

Click!!

The shackles and chains broke, turning into golden energy and pouring into Ye Tian's body, refining Ye Tian's primordial-level control body and making his primordial-level control body progress again.

And at this time, Ye Tian found that the black aura had been consumed a lot.

"This black aura is really terrifying, I have broken a shackle chain with the help of it, it has not been exhausted, this is much greater than the power of the cursed black stone. Give it a name, what's it called?"

Ye Tian thought about it, he still had to call it Primordial Black Qi!

In the following days, Ye Tian continued to use the primordial black qi to break the shackles and chains, and after consuming enough life white stones, Ye Tian spent hundreds of thousands of realm river years, and finally broke three shackles and chains one after another, breaking a total of seven shackles and chains, and his strength was raised to the extreme of the Nine Realm-level masters.

He only needed to break two more shackles and chains, and he could impact to the Ten Realm-level Masters realm.

However, at this time, the primordial black qi was consumed by Ye Tian.

"Gotta find a new primordial black gas!"

Ye Tian muttered.

If it was for the Xuantu controller to know, Ye Tian would definitely be dumbfounded if he still had to find a new primordial black qi.

What the eternal controllers couldn't avoid, Ye Tian even had to take the initiative to go up and make up?

Of course, the primordial black qi is not so easy to find, first of all, it is impossible to perceive, if it can be perceived, other eternal masters will not be unlucky to encounter the primordial black qi.

"No, if you look for the primordial black gas by yourself, if you are unlucky, I am afraid that you will not be able to find it for a long time. It's better to release the news directly, if anyone is infected by the primordial black gas, I can help treat it. I only need to pay a little curse for the black stone, and in this way, the other Eternal Masters will definitely come to me if they really get the primordial black qi. Even if it's a clone of the will, people are not willing to give up, and they will come to me!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

After all, he had treated the Xuantu Controller before, so the others still trusted his methods very much.

When the time comes, he will be able to attract the primordial black qi from the other eternal masters to his body, and he can continue to break the shackles and chains, and he will no longer need to find the primordial black qi himself.

So, Ye Tian immediately went to publicize.

Soon, the news spread throughout the entire Origin Realm Sea.

As for Ye Tian's naming of this black breath as Primordial Black Gas, it was naturally recognized, after all, everyone didn't know much about this black aura itself, and the name Primordial Black Breath was also appropriate, so it was used.

Xuantian Sect.

When the Xuantu Controller knew this news, he immediately sighed: "The Infinite Controller is really a good person, although it is to earn a little curse black stone, but it will also save the lives of other Eternal Masters!"

However, what he didn't know was that Ye Tian was not just for making money, but also for the primordial black qi.

Ye Tian didn't know if others would discover the mystery of the primordial black qi in the future, but it shouldn't be easy to discover for the time being.

He was able to find out that it was because he could withstand the invasion of the primordial black qi, while the other eternal controllers couldn't bear it, they couldn't bear it directly, and they needed to protect their lives with things that saved their lives, where would they dare to continue cultivating and impact the shackles and chains!

If others dare to do this, they are looking for death!

So, he wasn't worried at all.

this day.

Ye Tian finally ushered in the first guest, the Nine Realms Level Controller, Breaking the Saint!

The Saint Breaker is not weak, but this time it was his will clone that hit the primordial black qi.

When Ye Tian saw the Saint Breaking Master, he obviously sensed that his will clone was in a state of collapse.

"Infinite Master, are you really able to solve the primordial black qi in my body?"

The Saintbreaker asked.

"Of course you can, the physical condition of the master of the Xuantu has been solved by me. However, the remuneration still has to be paid!" Ye Tian said.

"You're talking about a hundred cursed black stones, right?"

Breaking the Saint Master's Way.

"That's right, it's a hundred cursed black stones!" Ye Tian nodded, "However, I won't teach you how to deal with the primordial black qi, I will attract the primordial black qi in your body, and then I will deal with it myself." In the future, if you are still hit by the primordial black qi, you can continue to come to me!"

"No problem, just dispose of the primordial black gas!"

Ye Tian said.

Attracting the primordial black qi in other people's bodies from the root is a method that Ye Tian has only recently created, and it can be regarded as another use of the Black Induction Technique.

He's called it Black Induction II!

After the Saint Breaker took out a hundred cursed black stones, Ye Tian grabbed the body of the Saint Breaker with one hand and launched the Black Attraction Technique II.

Airplanes!!!

The primordial black qi at the root of the primordial-level control body of the Saint-Breaking Controller was sucked out in a trace.

"That's so many!"

Ye Tian was a little surprised.

Eight wisps of primordial black gas!

It was more than he had encountered before, and the Saintbreaker Master didn't know whether to call him lucky or unlucky.

Soon, this wisp of primordial black qi was caught by Ye Tian and inhaled into his body.

The primordial black qi was all sucked away, and the Broken Saint Controller only felt a little weak, but it was not a big deal.

"Thank you, Infinite Master!"

The Saintbreaker Master thanked.

It only cost a hundred cursed blackstones to save this clone, and this time it was too cost-effective.

At the same time, he also felt that Ye Tian was too benevolent and righteous, and if he was another eternal controller, it would be impossible to make a move without charging thousands or even tens of thousands of cursed black stones.

"Saint-Breaking Master, I won't keep you, and I also have to deal with the primordial black qi in my body as soon as possible!

Ye Tian said.

"Then I'll take my leave!"

The Broken Master is gone.

After he left, Ye Tian announced a retreat.

"I hope that with the help of these eight wisps of primordial black qi, I can break the two shackles and chains in one fell swoop and impact to the realm of the Ten Realm-level controllers!"

Ye Tian said expectantly.

......
